n: The Finest Shield in the Land

steps.t: Nef thinks he dropped his shield in Jä-rannit along the road to Itä-mâ at a junction in the roads. Nef has asked you to search for the shield he lost …
Nef is in Sûri-kylä, north from Itä-mâ along the Ice Bay. You should return Nef's shield to him at once.
